reviews.comment:
Pesimo servicio de reparacion mecanica . Personal incompetente que no esta a la altura de la responsabilidad como personal del Automovil Club. Dejaron el auto peor de lo que estaba. Problema irresuelto

(Translated by Google)
Terrible mechanical repair service. Incompetent staff who are not up to the task of representing the Automobile Club. They left the car in worse condition than before. Problem unresolved.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUbWZiRWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Me ayudaron aún sin ser socia. Super amables. Había pinchado neumatico y ellos me lo cambiaron y me asesoraron. Gracias!!!

(Translated by Google)
They helped me even though I'm not a member. Super friendly. I had a flat tire and they changed it and gave me advice. Thank you!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUNS1mMUpnEAE

reviews.comment:
ambiente 10 puntos, vengo siempre a merendar y los chicos siempre atentos y pendientes de todo. Lugar limpio atención excelente y un trato espectacular. Café exquisito y medialunas deliciosas

(Translated by Google)
A 10-point atmosphere. I always come here for a snack, and the staff are always attentive and on top of everything. The place is clean, with excellent service and spectacular treatment. Exquisite coffee and delicious croissants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUczV6WHVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Conozco muchos FULL, pero el de Cabildo no lo iguala ninguno. Sus empleados, son exquisitos en su atención, amables serviciales y siempre con una sonrisa ARRIBA FULL CABILDO

(Translated by Google)
I know many FULL restaurants, but the one on Cabildo is unmatched. Their employees are exceptionally attentive, friendly, helpful, and always smiling. Go FULL CABILDO!
